title: How Has Legalizaation changed my life   Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle, filming while very high, responds to a viewer request about cannabis legalization in his area. He covers his experiences with legal dispensary products (oil/molasses pens, hash, edibles), cost comparisons, health improvements from switching to vaporizing, and his long-term plan to transition away from smoking entirely. He reflects on how legalization has changed his consumption habits and philosophy.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wholly positive — going back is unfathomable; it's been a year-long party
Will buy legally; no reason to bother someone to save a few bucks when a store is nearby
High all the time now, but plans to taper to purely utilitarian use once life shifts to writing
Much healthier — reduced asthma symptoms, lungs feel better
Strongly prefers it — very potent, affordable, no smoke, and eventual goal is to stop smoking entirely
Far better than the Mexican brick weed of the 90s; now has strain variety, potency choices, and good taste
Never had a truly bad one from weed alone; worst experiences were acid flashbacks triggered while high
